# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{
  "change_summary": "Made `ralph-burning pr open` idempotent after post-commit failures. The command now detects a single already-rendered squash commit in `origin/master..HEAD`, reconstructs the expected PR title/body from committed review-scope diff stats, verifies the commit message matches the expected rendered squash message, and retries only the push and PR creation steps without soft-resetting or recommitting. Non-matching hand-written commits still fail through the existing `NonCheckpointCommits` path. Added mockable committed-diff support to `PrToolPort` and regression tests for rerunning after transient `git push` and `gh pr create` failures.",

      "description": "Inspected the existing `pr_open` flow and identified the retry gap between the squashed commit step and the fallible push/PR creation steps.",
